query:
SELECT
            COUNT(uuid)
        FROM
            pk_systems
        WHERE
            uuid IN (
                SELECT
                    system_uuid
                FROM
                    pk_notify_systems
            )
        OR
            id IN (
                SELECT
                    system_id
                FROM
                    pk_guilds
                INNER JOIN
                    pk_fronters
                ON
                    pk_guilds.guild_id = pk_fronters.guild_id
            )
